description: BCI and telemetry research lab, storing metrics envelopes, tileset performance data, and analysis artifacts.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Telemetry should remain structural and numeric; no narrative content here.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All telemetry and summary artifacts must reference their canonical schemas.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: Telemetry must record which tileset, geometryProfile, and contract families are being measured.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: Telemetry transformers should use the spine to classify events by objectKind and repo.

authoringHints.summary: Use this repo for BCI metrics, tileset selection events, and aggregate summaries that inform contract tuning.
aiBehavior: Do not generate contracts here; only telemetry and analysis artifacts.
Always include references to tilesetId and geometryProfileId in tilesetSelectionEvent artifacts.
Use these artifacts to propose changes to contracts upstream, not to directly influence runtime behavior.
